Premium New Build Specialists

Trusted by Queensland's Premium Builders

Specialising in new build roofing for high-end residential and commercial projects. When quality matters more than price, builders and developers choose North Brisbane Metal Roofing.

Get A Free QuoteOur Services
The North Brisbane Difference

Excellence in Every Detail

From architect-designed estates in Ascot and Hamilton to contemporary townhouse developments in New Farm and Clayfield, we deliver the precision and quality that premium projects demand.

Premium New Build Focus

We specialise exclusively in new construction projects—from luxury residential estates to commercial developments. This focused approach ensures superior project management, quality control, and seamless integration with your build schedule.

Architectural-Grade Materials

We source only the finest roofing materials including premium Colorbond steel, standing seam systems, and custom metal fabrications. Every product is backed by comprehensive manufacturer warranties and our 10-year written guarantee.

Master Craftsmen

Our team consists of fully licensed, comprehensively insured metal roofing specialists with extensive experience in high-end residential and commercial projects. We understand the exacting standards required for premium construction.

White-Glove Service

From initial consultation with architects and builders to final handover, we deliver exceptional project coordination and communication. Our reputation is built on reliability, precision, and delivering premium results on schedule.

Industry Leaders

Proudly Working With

We partner with Australia's most trusted roofing and building material suppliers to deliver exceptional quality

Premium Skylights & Roof Windows

Premium Steel Roofing

High-Strength Steel

Quality Roofing Products

Licensed & Certified

QBCC Licensed & Fully Insured
Premium Services

Specialising in New Build Excellence

Trusted by Queensland's premium builders and commercial developers. Our focus on new construction allows meticulous workmanship without the pressures of re-roofing projects.

New Build Residential

Specialising in new home construction roofing. Premium Colorbond installations for custom-built homes where quality and precision are paramount. Builder-grade workmanship.

Learn More
01

Commercial New Builds

Premium commercial roofing for new construction projects. Coordinated scheduling, quality materials, and professional site management for builders and developers.

Learn More
02

Metal Roof Maintenance & Repairs

Specialised maintenance for existing metal roofing systems. Storm damage response, leak detection, and protective treatments to extend the life of your Colorbond roof.

Learn More
03

Premium Guttering

Complete roofing systems with custom box gutters and architectural fascias. Engineered drainage solutions that complement premium roofing installations.

Learn More
04
Why Choose Us

The NBMR Difference

We're not just installing roofs—we're protecting homes. We measure our success not just by the roofs we install, but by the relationships we build.

Extensive Experience

We've learnt that cutting corners destroys quality. Every project benefits from our years of experience working with North Brisbane's diverse housing stock.

Quality Materials Selection

We partner exclusively with trusted Australian manufacturers and start every project with top-grade Colorbond and Zincalume products.

Uncompromising Workmanship

Our reputation is built on the quality of every roof we install. We're committed to exceeding customer expectations through meticulous attention to detail.

Transparent, Fair Pricing

You'll never face hidden costs or surprise charges. We provide detailed, accurate quotes that clearly outline all work, materials, and costs.

More About Our Company
dji_fly_20231116_092524_260_1700090826383_vide from Simon on Vimeo
Playing in picture-in-picture
SpeedNormal

10+

Years of Experience Serving North Brisbane

Our Coverage

Servicing Northern Gold Coast to Southern Sunshine Coast

No matter where your property is located across South East Queensland, we bring the same commitment to excellence and professional service. We're proud to serve homeowners and businesses throughout the region.

Call Us Today

0498 478 739

Email Us

info@nbmr.com.au

Get A Free Quote

Service Areas

Northern Gold Coast to Southern Sunshine Coast

  • Ascot
  • Hamilton
  • New Farm
  • Clayfield
  • Sandgate
  • North Brisbane
  • Sanctuary Cove
  • Hope Island
  • Mooloolaba
  • Noosa Heads
  • Peregian Beach
  • Coolum Beach

Don't see your suburb? Contact us to check availability.

Our Workflow

Our Installation Process

Professional Service from Start to Finish

01

Initial Consultation

We visit your property to assess your needs, discuss your goals, and answer your questions.

02

Detailed Quote

You'll receive a comprehensive written quote outlining all work, materials, costs, and timelines.

03

Project Planning

Once approved, we schedule your project and coordinate all necessary preparations and materials.

04

Professional Installation

Our experienced team works efficiently while maintaining the highest quality standards.

05

Quality Inspection

We conduct thorough quality inspections to ensure every aspect meets our exacting standards.

06

Completion

We remove all debris, leaving your property clean, and provide warranty documentation.

Client Testimonials

Trusted by Premium Clients

4.8
(Based on 58 Google Reviews)

Benjamin Plunkett

Brisbane

"Having been in the building industry for over 25 years and operating as a builder you experience the best and the worst of trades. Northside Brisbane Metal Roofing is a breath of fresh air and are at the top of their game. Communication, professionalism, and quality workmanship make them stand out from the rest."

16 hours ago Google Review

Kilian Dineen

Brisbane

"Excellent communication, always on time and very helpful, would highly recommend Kayne and his business."

3 months ago Google Review

Gareth Simmons

Brisbane

"I had a leak in my roof, which was becoming a real problem for me in big rain events and providing quite a bit of stress with damage to internal ceilings and finishes. When I contacted Kayne he was extremely thorough in gaining an understanding of the problem and providing solutions. The quality of the work was excellent and professional throughout."

4 months ago Google Review
View All Reviews on Google

## Premium New Build Specialists

# Trusted by Queensland's Premium Builders

Specialising in new build roofing for high-end residential and commercial projects. When quality matters more than price, builders and developers choose North Brisbane Metal Roofing.

[Get A Free Quote](https://nbmr.com.au/quote-request) [Our Services](https://nbmr.com.au/services)

The North Brisbane Difference

## Excellence in Every Detail

From architect-designed estates in Ascot and Hamilton to contemporary townhouse developments in New Farm and Clayfield, we deliver the precision and quality that premium projects demand.

### Premium New Build Focus

We specialise exclusively in new construction projects—from luxury residential estates to commercial developments. This focused approach ensures superior project management, quality control, and seamless integration with your build schedule.

### Architectural-Grade Materials

We source only the finest roofing materials including premium Colorbond steel, standing seam systems, and custom metal fabrications. Every product is backed by comprehensive manufacturer warranties and our 10-year written guarantee.

### Master Craftsmen

Our team consists of fully licensed, comprehensively insured metal roofing specialists with extensive experience in high-end residential and commercial projects. We understand the exacting standards required for premium construction.

### White-Glove Service

From initial consultation with architects and builders to final handover, we deliver exceptional project coordination and communication. Our reputation is built on reliability, precision, and delivering premium results on schedule.

Industry Leaders

## Proudly Working With

We partner with Australia's most trusted roofing and building material suppliers to deliver exceptional quality

![Velux - Premium Skylights & Roof Windows](https://nbmr.com.au/_assets/v11/3e8ccdab4c645b61328bdb7b68a8ca0c61ba7eae.png)

Premium Skylights & Roof Windows

Premium Steel Roofing

Quality Roofing Products

Licensed & Certified

QBCC Licensed & Fully Insured

![Premium metal roofing installation](https://nbmr.com.au/_assets/v11/a88a520de13d95958c5043cb01dc5a0827e3af7d.png)

Premium Services

## Specialising in New Build Excellence

Trusted by Queensland's premium builders and commercial developers. Our focus on new construction allows meticulous workmanship without the pressures of re-roofing projects.

[**New Build Residential** \\
\\
Specialising in new home construction roofing. Premium Colorbond installations for custom-built homes where quality and precision are paramount. Builder-grade workmanship.\\
\\
Learn More \\
\\
01](https://nbmr.com.au/services/metal-roofing) [**Commercial New Builds** \\
\\
Premium commercial roofing for new construction projects. Coordinated scheduling, quality materials, and professional site management for builders and developers.\\
\\
Learn More \\
\\
02](https://nbmr.com.au/services/colorbond-roofing) [**Metal Roof Maintenance & Repairs** \\
\\
Specialised maintenance for existing metal roofing systems. Storm damage response, leak detection, and protective treatments to extend the life of your Colorbond roof.\\
\\
Learn More \\
\\
03](https://nbmr.com.au/services/roof-restoration) [**Premium Guttering** \\
\\
Complete roofing systems with custom box gutters and architectural fascias. Engineered drainage solutions that complement premium roofing installations.\\
\\
Learn More \\
\\
04](https://nbmr.com.au/services/guttering)

Why Choose Us

## The NBMR Difference

We're not just installing roofs—we're protecting homes. We measure our success not just by the roofs we install, but by the relationships we build.

### Extensive Experience

We've learnt that cutting corners destroys quality. Every project benefits from our years of experience working with North Brisbane's diverse housing stock.

### Quality Materials Selection

We partner exclusively with trusted Australian manufacturers and start every project with top-grade Colorbond and Zincalume products.

### Uncompromising Workmanship

Our reputation is built on the quality of every roof we install. We're committed to exceeding customer expectations through meticulous attention to detail.

### Transparent, Fair Pricing

You'll never face hidden costs or surprise charges. We provide detailed, accurate quotes that clearly outline all work, materials, and costs.

[More About Our Company](https://nbmr.com.au/about)

Our Workflow

Professional Service from Start to Finish

We visit your property to assess your needs, discuss your goals, and answer your questions.

You'll receive a comprehensive written quote outlining all work, materials, costs, and timelines.

03

#### Project Planning

Once approved, we schedule your project and coordinate all necessary preparations and materials.

04

Our experienced team works efficiently while maintaining the highest quality standards.

05

We conduct thorough quality inspections to ensure every aspect meets our exacting standards.

06

Client Testimonials

## Trusted by Premium Clients
